scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:renderer
scripts.test:renderer: tsc --ignoreConfig --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --target ES2022 --types @webgpu/types --skipLibCheck --outDir node_modules/.cache/renderer-tests --rootDir . src/splatPlateContract.ts src/realSmokeScene.ts && node --test tests/renderer/*.test.mjs
